message:
Use stable_map to preserve XML element order in parse_xml

Replace std::map with detail::stable_map when grouping child elements.
This preserves the original document order instead of alphabetically
sorting field names in the output records.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
